hero.title1: 30 YEARS OF HIGH QUALITY VIETNAMESE GOODS
hero.desc: A journey built on consumer trust and the bravery of Vietnamese enterprises.

core_values.v1_desc: A pioneering program to empower consumers to directly evaluate and select deserving businesses, establishing the most objective measure for quality.
core_values.v2_desc: From a voting campaign, it has developed into a strong ecosystem supporting businesses with trade promotions, fairs, and deep connections.
core_values.v3_desc: Continuously updating international integration standards, building 'Green Standards' and digitizing operations to accompany businesses in sustainable development.

footer.desc: 30-year journey of Pride and Continuance (1996 - 2026). An ecosystem accompanying Vietnamese enterprises to reach out to the world.
footer.org: Organizer: Business Association of High Quality Vietnamese Goods
footer.copyright: © 2026 Business Association of High Quality Vietnamese Goods. All rights reserved.
